_note: House style for Chinese proper nouns. Each CN entry has a `canonical` form (the primary spelling we prefer) and an `also_acceptable` list (forms we tolerate without comment — typically the well-known English title alongside the Mandarin pinyin). The validator (build/validate-cross-references.mjs) only WARNs on spellings that are neither canonical nor acceptable — typically toned-pinyin forms in body prose where the untoned form should be used (toned forms are appropriate inside .sh-py / .card-py / .a-py spans, all of which the validator strips before checking). Add a new entry when the corpus shows variant spellings worth normalizing.
